title: Sacramento, CA – Legislation authored by Assemblymember Diane Papan to improve the review of local housing elements as part of the Regional Housing Needs Allocation (RHNA) process

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 650 will address the challenges faced by local jurisdictions and the California Department of Housing and Community Development in obtaining timely certification of housing elements.",
    "The RHNA process requires local jurisdictions to submit detailed housing plans, known as housing elements, to HCD for review and certification.",
    "Without certification, cities risk losing access to state funding for infrastructure and affordable housing.",
    "Delays in the certification of housing elements have hindered development projects and jeopardized affordable housing initiatives.",
    "AB 650 mandates that HCD provide clear and actionable guidance to local governments to avoid confusion in the certification process."
  ]
}
```
